content.problemStatement:
Chef took NNN total tests in his university, numbered 111 to NNN chronologically. Each was graded out of 100100100 marks. He scored AiA_iAi​ marks in the iii-th test.

Chef's scholarship requires that his average remains at or above 404040 marks after taking each test. Was Chef able to keep his scholarship? Print Yes or No accordingly.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of multiple lines of input.

The first line of each test case contains NNN - the number of tests.
The second line contains NNN integers - A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​.




Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line Yes\text{Yes}Yes if Chef was able to keep his scholarship and No\text{No}No otherwise.


It is allowed to print each character in either case, i.e. YES\text{YES}YES, yes\text{yes}yes, yES\text{yES}yES will all be accepted as a positive response.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 1 : Chef's average dropped below 404040 after the first test itself, so he immediately loses the scholarship. His average becomes 505050 later on, however this does not matter.
Test Case 2 : Chef's average after the first test is 414141, and after the second and third tests are both 404040. Hence, at all times, his average was at or above 404040, so he does not lose his scholarship.
